LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EDDIE ZHANG INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ENTRY OF AMENDED FINAL JUDGEMENT. (SEE MINI-MINUTES AND WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE ABOVE AND EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG PRIOR TO THE TIME SET FOR HEARING. NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to the hearing, Counsel appears in an abundance of caution. The clerk informs the party the court did not receive any notice to contest the court's TR. The Court's TR will be the final ruling of the Court.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EDDIE ZHANG INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Amended Final Judgement.

Plaintiff Eddie Zhang's unopposed Motion For Entry Of Amended Final Judgement is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order consistent with the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF EDDIE ZHANG's Amended Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class And Representative Action Settlement.

Matter discussed. The Court inquires as to whether anybody is present to oppose the motion. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants the motion as unopposed. The Court further schedules a final fairness and approval hearing to August 1, 2024, at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Order signed.
